====Pokémon Evolutions====
Hilda appeared in ''[[PE04|The Plan]]''. She was first seen in a flashback, playing with her {{p|Tepig}} and being attracted to watch [[Ghetsis]]'s speech in [[Accumula Town]]. In the present day, she appeared at [[N's Castle]], showing Ghetsis that she had obtained the [[Light Stone]], before stepping into the castle's throne room to battle [[N]].
